encounters.name: Goblin Ambush
encounters.description: A band of goblins ambush travelers on the forest road.
encounters.tactics: Goblins use Nimble Escape to hide behind trees after attacking. The boss stays in the back and throws javelins.
encounters.map_notes: Dense trees provide half cover. Road runs north-south through the encounter area.
encounters.treasure: 25 gp, 2 javelins, crude map showing nearby cave

encounters.name: Ogre Bridge Toll
encounters.description: An ogre demands toll from anyone crossing his bridge.
encounters.tactics: Ogre demands 10 gp per person. If refused, he attacks. If party pretends to pay, he might be distracted.
encounters.map_notes: Stone bridge spans a 50-foot deep ravine. Bridge is 10 feet wide.
encounters.treasure: 45 gp, various trinkets from previous victims

encounters.name: Undead Graveyard
encounters.description: The dead rise from their graves at midnight.
encounters.tactics: Skeletons use ranged attacks from behind tombstones. Zombies and ghouls rush forward to engage in melee.
encounters.map_notes: Graveyard with scattered tombstones (half cover). Mausoleum in center provides full cover.
encounters.treasure: Ancient holy symbol (25 gp), potion of healing in mausoleum

encounters.name: Dragon Wyrmling's Lair
encounters.description: A young dragon has made its lair in a mountain cave.
encounters.tactics: Dragon uses flight to stay out of melee range, breathing fire when multiple enemies cluster. Retreats if below 20 HP.
encounters.map_notes: Cave entrance 20 feet above ground. Interior chamber is 60 feet across with 30-foot ceiling.
encounters.treasure: 350 gp, gem-encrusted goblet (150 gp), scroll of fireball

encounters.name: Bandit King's Stronghold
encounters.description: The notorious Bandit King holds court in ancient ruins.
encounters.tactics: Bandits use cover and flank enemies. Captain uses Cunning Action to disengage. Veterans protect the captain.
encounters.map_notes: Ruined castle with crumbling walls. Multiple levels provide tactical advantages.
encounters.treasure: 800 gp, longsword +1 (Captain's weapon), map to hidden treasure cache

encounters.name: Troll Bridge
encounters.description: A troll blocks the only bridge across the river.
encounters.tactics: Troll regenerates - party needs fire or acid damage. Goblins throw rocks from distance.
encounters.map_notes: Wooden bridge over swift river. Forest on both sides.
encounters.treasure: 65 gp, ring of swimming (from previous victim)

encounters.name: Mind Flayer Outpost
encounters.description: A mind flayer has established an outpost in the Underdark.
encounters.tactics: Mind flayer uses Extract Brain on weakened foes. Grimlocks attack first, ogres hold the line.
encounters.map_notes: Natural cavern with fungal forests. Underground river provides fresh water.
encounters.treasure: Psionic focus crystal (500 gp), potion of mind reading, map to drow city

encounters.name: Hydra's Lake
encounters.description: A hydra lairs in the murky waters of a swamp lake.
encounters.tactics: Hydra emerges from water to attack. Multiple heads allow multiple attacks. Fire prevents head regrowth.
encounters.map_notes: Shallow lake surrounded by difficult terrain swamp. Small island in center.
encounters.treasure: Sunken treasure chest (400 gp, 3 gems worth 100 gp each)

encounters.name: Manticore Aerie
encounters.description: A manticore hunts from its cliffside aerie.
encounters.tactics: Manticore flies and shoots tail spikes. Lands to finish off wounded prey.
encounters.map_notes: Cliff face with cave entrance 100 feet up. Open hills below.
encounters.treasure: 180 gp, human remains with leather armor +1

encounters.name: Lich's Tower
encounters.description: An ancient lich plots in his fortified tower.
encounters.tactics: Lich uses legendary actions and spellcasting from range. Paralyzes key threats. Retreats to reform if destroyed.
encounters.map_notes: Five-story tower with dungeon below. Warded against teleportation.
encounters.treasure: Phylactery (must be destroyed), spellbook with 20 spells, 2000 gp, various magic items

encounters.name: Kobold Mine Trap
encounters.description: Kobolds have trapped an old mine shaft.
encounters.tactics: Kobolds use Pack Tactics and retreat through small tunnels. Traps deal 1d6 damage (DC 12 to disable).
encounters.map_notes: Narrow mine tunnels (Small creatures have advantage). Pit traps and tripwires throughout.
encounters.treasure: 45 gp, shiny rocks collection, crude trap-making tools

encounters.name: Frost Giant Raiding Party
encounters.description: Frost giants raid a frontier settlement.
encounters.tactics: Giants throw rocks from distance, then charge with great axes. Wolves flank and knock prone.
encounters.map_notes: Snowy tundra with scattered boulders. Settlement has wooden buildings for cover.
encounters.treasure: 300 gp, frost giant jarl's axe (magic weapon), winter wolf pelts (50 gp each)

encounters.name: Beholder's Cavern
encounters.description: A beholder has claimed a vast cavern as its lair.
encounters.tactics: Beholder floats in center, using eye rays on multiple targets. Gazers provide distraction.
encounters.map_notes: Massive cavern with stalactites (can be shot down). Underground lake in corner.
encounters.treasure: 1500 gp, beholder eye stalks (alchemical ingredients), magic ring

encounters.name: Cultist Ritual
encounters.description: Cultists perform a dark ritual in a swamp clearing.
encounters.tactics: Cultists try to complete ritual (5 rounds). Leader casts spiritual weapon. Fanatics heal leader.
encounters.map_notes: Stone altar in center of clearing. Torches provide dim light.
encounters.treasure: Ritual dagger (25 gp), cult robes with hidden pockets (15 gp), scroll of animate dead

encounters.name: Kraken Attack
encounters.description: A kraken attacks the party's ship on the open ocean.
encounters.tactics: Kraken stays underwater, grabbing ship and crew. Lightning bolt hits multiple targets. Swallows enemies whole.
encounters.map_notes: Open ocean. Ship provides limited cover. Falling into water is a major hazard.
encounters.treasure: Sunken ship treasure (5000 gp), kraken ink sac (rare alchemical ingredient)

difficulty_guide.easy: Suitable for a single session, low resource drain
difficulty_guide.medium: May require some healing resources, good single-session encounter
difficulty_guide.hard: Will require significant resources, may need short rest after
difficulty_guide.deadly: Potentially lethal, ensure party has escape route
difficulty_guide.epic: Campaign climax material, ensure party is fully rested
